name: Crockpot Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice mushrooms.
2. Remove skin from chicken.
3. Spray a 12-inch skillet with nonstick spray and coat evenly.
4. Brown the sliced mushrooms, onions, and chicken pieces on all sides over medium heat for about 15 minutes.
5. Stir in seasonings and transfer the mixture to the crockpot. The dish can be refrigerated overnight if needed.
6. Start the crockpot on LOW.
7. When ingredients are heated through, add rice.
8. Cook until the rice is done.
